creator: se@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tatsuki Makino from comment #10)

> So my /etc/make.conf has the following written in it.
> 
> .if !empty(.CURDIR:tA:M/usr/ports/japanese/xpdf)
> BUILD_DEPENDS=  ${ADOBECMAPDIR}/ai0/CMap/Identity-H:print/adobe-cmaps
> .endif

This is a missing BUILD_DEPENDS entry in the the japanese/xpdf port.

It can of course be locally fixed in make.conf, but adding that line to the affected port would fix it for all users.

I'd prefer if "poudriere testport" did not provide run dependencies before invoking "make stage" since that hides the fact that some BUILD_DEPENDS are missing.
